title: Create a Constant
description: Add a constant named MAX_DRIVE_SPEED with a value of 0.8 to the Constants class. Do not declare it with the final keyword.

title: Create an Object
description: Create a TalonFX object named intakeMotor. It should be declared as private and final within the class, and be initialized using device ID 3.

title: Create a Method
description: Create a method called stopIntakeMotor. The method should be declared as static, and it must stop the motor named intakeMotor using the appropriate motor function (do not set the motor speed to 0).
